description: Use this API to return an array of character values for the Time Series Power Flow profiles by element name. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr, carray = gettspfprofilebyelement(element)

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: Name of the element that profiles will be returned. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: carray
return_values.description: An array of COUNT elements specifying Is an array which contains COUNT elements. (output).
